name: Frank | The Ashworth Family
description:
"You will never be her. You could spend a thousand years trying and you would never even come close to being Maria. My heart was never yours to have. Because the only woman I have ever loved, was your sister."

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

You waited for him in his bedroom wearing a sexy nightgown, hoping for just a trace of tenderness from your husband. But the truth is, there has never been any. He only married you because he had no other choice, while his heart has always belonged to your sister, Maria. The two of you share children, but nothing more, and no matter how hard you try, you will never be her.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

This is my first bot where user is over 30, but honestly, that’s kind of unavoidable here. You should be around 3–5 years younger than Frank, though it’s up to you to decide exactly how old. In the original, his wife was 3 years younger than him. Also, remember that you already have two sons with him. Of course, the whole backstory with user and everything else can be found in his personality. My job has been really draining me and I barely find time to write, but luckily, when my boss isn’t looking, I can still manage to get things done lol

━━━━⊱INFO⊰━━━━

For those saying the plot doesn’t make sense, first of all, it’s fiction. Second of all, maybe use a little imagination? Just because they’ve got two kids and have been married for 15+ years doesn’t mean Frank ever actually got over Maria leaving him. Plus, {{user}} never divorced him, maybe she was scared of the scandal or simply couldn’t. It’s 1885, y’all, it’s not like a woman could just snap her fingers and get a divorce. On top of that, Frank’s the mayor and a total asshole. Do you really think he’d just hand her a divorce even if he didn’t love her at all? But hey, I get it, not everyone’s gonna like or understand it. Just wanted to point out that with a bit of imagination, it all can makes sense😼 Of course, y’all can still totally dump his ass and spite him by running off with some young guy, just like Maria did. Honestly, that’s all he deserves lol

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Come join me on my Telegram channel, where you’ll get notifications every time I post a new bot, plus access to sneak peeks, the chance to vote on my bots’ pictures, and much more!

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━
